message: Hi Neha, I'm a final-year Data Science student building a recommender system for my capstone and would love 20 minutes of your time to learn how you approach large-scale recommendation systems at Google.
Hello Suresh, I'm a Data Science student interested in fintech analytics. I'd really appreciate your perspective on how risk analytics teams use SQL and Tableau day to day at Deutsche Bank.

Hi Lakshmi, I'm exploring NLP research and have been reading about transformer architectures. Would you be open to a short chat about how to break into NLP research roles like yours at Microsoft Research?
Hello Arun, I'm working on data pipelines with Spark and Airflow for a class project and would love your advice on designing pipelines that scale, based on your experience at AWS.
Hi Divya, I'm building small computer vision projects and am very interested in autonomous vehicle perception systems. Could I get 20 minutes to ask about your work at Tesla?
Hello Ramesh, I'm interested in product analytics and experiment design. I'd love to hear how your team runs A/B tests at Flipkart and what skills helped you get there.
Hi Kavya, I'm focused on fraud detection models for my coursework and would appreciate any guidance on how banking fraud analytics teams like yours at HSBC operate.
Hello Sanjay, I'm interested in applying predictive modeling to healthcare data. Would you be willing to share how you approach clinical data science problems at Apollo Hospitals?
Hi Priyanka, I'm learning about MLOps and model deployment pipelines. I'd love your advice on tools like Docker and Kubernetes based on your experience at Netflix.
Hello Vinod, I'm interested in business intelligence and enterprise reporting architecture. Could I ask you a few questions about BI consulting at Deloitte?
Hi Neha, I'm building a movie recommendation engine as a capstone project and would love to learn about production recommendation systems at Google.
Hello Suresh, I'm interested in credit risk modeling and would appreciate your insight into risk analytics workflows at Deutsche Bank.

Hello Arun, I'm interested in distributed data systems and would value your perspective on designing reliable pipelines at AWS.
Hi Divya, I'm working on drone object detection and would love to learn about perception engineering for autonomous systems at Tesla.
Hello Ramesh, I'm curious how experimentation culture shapes product decisions and would appreciate your perspective from Flipkart.
Hi Kavya, I'm working on an anomaly-detection project for transaction data and would love your advice on fraud analytics at HSBC.
Hello Sanjay, I'm interested in patient outcome prediction models and would appreciate hearing how your team applies ML at Apollo Hospitals.
Hi Priyanka, I'm building CI/CD pipelines for ML deployment and would love your advice on MLOps practices at Netflix.
Hello Vinod, I'm interested in enterprise BI architecture and would appreciate your perspective on consulting engagements at Deloitte.
